overview: RentEase — a property rental and services platform where users can post and browse listings across multiple categories including rentals (flat, hotel, house, convention hall), a marketplace for buying/selling, service providers (shifting, event planning, decoration, maintenance, cleaning, catering), and a roommate finder. Features multiple image uploads, location search, OTP-based authentication, and a Spring Boot REST API backend.
features: OTP-based user authentication with password setup
Editable user profile (name, address, email, phone)
Post listings with multiple image uploads across all categories
Browse Rentals: flats, hotels, houses, convention halls
Marketplace for buying and selling items
Services directory: shifting, event planning, decoration, maintenance, cleaning, catering
Roommate Finder for shared living matches
Full listing detail view with image gallery
